description: Known as "Provider" in the original LeanIX metamodel
External organization supplying or manufacturing an IT component
Vendor mapping, in-house vs. third-party analysis, vendor lock-in identification
Do not model internal org units as vendors
Internal development is abstracted to "Dr. h.c. F. Porsche AG"
Enterprise Architects, Business Analysts, Business Unit Representatives
Supports sourcing strategy, risk management, and compliance
